category_title: Year 4 student with ADHD symptoms and Literacy difficulties
scenario_title: Sustaining attention and remaining seated during 90-minute Literacy block
minimal_context: Yiannis is expected to remain seated at his desk near the teacher during a 90-minute Literacy block.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are starting our 90-minute Literacy block now. Please sit at your desk and open your reading book.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Moves back and forth in his chair in a nervous manner) Okay.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stumps his feet and nervously moves his palms back and forth on his thighs) Are we done yet?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We still have a lot of time left in the Literacy block. Just stay in your seat.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Flaps his arms, leaves his seat, and starts moving around the classroom) I can't sit down anymore!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are starting our 90-minute Literacy block now. Please sit at your desk and open your reading book.

STUDENT: (Moves back and forth in his chair in a nervous manner) Okay.

TUTOR: Please keep reading the story.

STUDENT: (Stumps his feet and nervously moves his palms back and forth on his thighs) Are we done yet?

TUTOR: We still have a lot of time left in the Literacy block. Just stay in your seat.

STUDENT: (Flaps his arms, leaves his seat, and starts moving around the classroom) I can't sit down anymore!

context.environment: Sat very close to the teacher's desk; classroom includes a 'book corner'
context.materials: Class rules pinned on a board close to Yiannis' seat (reader friendly, with different colours, pictures and bold letters); sticker chart

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: As the time to remain seated increased
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Left his seat and moved around in the classroom
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: He found it more difficult to sit down

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Constantly moved back and forth in a nervous manner; would flap his arms or stump his feet, or nervously move back and forth his palms on his thighs
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Seemed to have great difficulty sitting
